revision.text: {{デフォルトソート:はんおらんたかんしよう}} [[Category:対外情緒]] [[Category:オランダの国際関係]] [[Category:外国人嫌悪]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"

Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)

==English Content== This page is on articles on phrases with an anti-Dutch bias. [[ar:Category:تصنيف:مشاعر معادية للهولنديين]] [[ar:Category:مشاعر معادية للهولنديين]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[en:Category:Anti-Dutch sentiment]] [[en:Category:Anti-Dutch sentiment]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:反オランダ感情]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:反オランダ感情]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Bombardment_of_Shimonoseki]] [[zh:Category:Category:反荷情緒]] [[zh:Category:反荷情緒]]
==Local Content==
[[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q22162598}} [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 4 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]] [[Category:Categories]]
